texto: Stella explained that when he had arrived, because of his English accent, she had assumed that he was me, and had asked where his fridge was. She didn't tell me what his reply was, and we can only hazard a guess, but I was impressed that he had been prepared to stay the night. It is surely a brave man who goes ahead and checks into an establishment where the first question is 'Where's your fridge?'. Especially if, as he had done, you had arrived by motorcycle.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Tony Hawks que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “Stella explained that when he had arrived, because of his English accent, she had assumed that he…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, funny, humorous, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

texto: One guy, seeing that I was hungry, insisted on buying me a huge lunch and when I thanked him for his kindness, he simply said, 'Pass it on.' I liked this selfless concept - repay me by rewarding someone else entirely with a generous dollop of goodwill.
